title: Poké Flute - Cobblemon
description: Turns Goat Horns into Poké Flutes. 2D icon in GUIs and a 3D model when held or on the ground. Made for Cobblemon.
body:
## Poké Flute Turns Goat Horns into Poké Flutes. 2D icon in GUIs and a 3D model when held or on the ground.
Each flute plays a unique tune from the Pokémon series when you toot it. **Incompatible with Iris shaders (for now) due to [limitations](https://github.com/IrisShaders/Iris/blob/multiloader-new/docs/usage/limitations.md). This resource pack makes use of Core Shaders.**

## Credit - Cobblemon for Poké Ball texture inspiration - https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon/-/blob/main/common/src/main/resources/assets/cobblemon/textures/poke_balls/poke_ball.png?ref_type=heads - joshxviii for sounds - https://github.com/joshxviii/poke-flute/tree/main/assets/minecraft/sounds/item/goat_horn - joshxviii for 2D Poké Flute GUI texture - https://github.com/joshxviii/poke-flute/blob/main/assets/minecraft/textures/item/goat_horn.png - ShockMicro for CorePerspectiveModels - https://github.com/ShockMicro/CorePerspectiveModels
